nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1871; const int b = 2080; const int c = 2134; const int d = 2173; const int e = 2205; const int f = 2233; const int g = 2258; const int h = 2282; const int i = 2305; const int j = 2327; const int k = 2349; const int l = 2372; const int m = 2395; const int n = 2419; const int o = 2444; const int p = 2472; const int q = 2504; const int r = 2543; const int s = 2597; const int t = 2805;
